market_summary: Live conditions show mixed signals with a risk-off atmosphere, which is not supporting aggressive trading setups.

failed_conditions: Brent stabilization and Iran talks resolution still pending
XOM.monitor_reason: Fresh headlines provide uncertain direction for oil.
XOM.execution_condition: Watch for oil direction to clarify: if Brent stabilizes above $100 and Iran talks collapse (oil re-spikes), upgrade to buy at $158-160; if de-escalation holds and oil breaks below $90, step aside and look for $148-152 re-entry

failed_conditions: WTI crude price direction not yet confirmed; no evidence UAL held the bounce from $89
UAL.monitor_reason: New headlines may impact crude oil pricing and UAL's stability.
UAL.execution_condition: WTI crude holding below $95 at open and through first 30 minutes of trading; UAL trading above $100 (confirming it held the bounce from $89 lows); no new Iran escalation headlines premarket

failed_conditions: Iran news resolution still pending; current oil prices are unclear
